memory.summary: I'm tempted to ditch the quick chore for instant leisure since I have free time, but that project is barely started and I'll regret it later.

desires: Don't let my friends down by canceling our hangout plan because I'm too tired or stressed.
Get that instant dopamine hit from finishing the quick chore now so I can feel accomplished immediately.
Avoid feeling like a slacker on this term project, even though I know I'll just procrastinate until the deadline.

goals.description: Hang out with cohort_3 immediately to show loyalty and kill the afternoon stress.
goals.rationale: My affiliation value (0.5) is my highest driver; letting them down feels like a betrayal of our trust level (7). The 'relaxing option' fits my impulsive need for instant dopamine over long-term planning.

goals.description: Sprint through quick_chore before leaving so I can feel accomplished without breaking focus.
goals.rationale: It's an easy win that satisfies my procrastination bias avoidance, but it's not worth delaying the social connection. I'll do it on the way or right after if energy permits.

agent.last_reasoning: My affiliation value (0.5) demands I bond with cohort_3 now to show loyalty; delaying feels like betrayal.
